title: Battle of Ithor (disambiguation)
content:
There have been several conflicts on the planet [[Ithor/Legends|Ithor]]:

*'''[[Mandalorian Wars]]'''
:*[[Battle of Ithor (Mandalorian Wars)|Battle of Ithor]]

*'''[[Jedi Civil War]]'''
:*[[Battle of Ithor (Jedi Civil War)|Battle of Ithor]]

*'''[[Imperial Era/Legends|Imperial Period conflicts]]'''
:*[[Subjugation of Ithor]]

*'''[[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]'''
:*A [[Battle of Ithor (0 ABY)|battle]] in [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]]
:*A [[skirmish at Ithor]]
:*[[Battle of Ottega]], in the [[Ottega system/Legends|Ithorian system]]
:*A [[Battle of Ithor (9 ABY)|battle]] during the [[Thrawn campaign]].

*'''[[Yuuzhan Vong War]]'''
:*The [[Battle of Ithor]]
